creator: weberbug@gmx.de
text:
The FreeBSD installer does not offer GELI encryption for Auto (UFS).
Currently this can only done with error prone manual steps.
(http://blog.ataboydesign.com/2014/01/25/freebsd-10-with-full-disk-encryption-on-ufs-filesystem/)

The ZFS installer does offer encryption, but people might prefer UFS (for reasons of memory usage or performance, e.g. on a virtual server).

So, the Auto (UFS) installer should also offer GELI encryption.
